title: HEALTH AND DENTAL SERVICES - 211info
text: BOYS & GIRLS CLUB OF SALEM, MARION AND POLK COUNTIES HEALTH AND DENTAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides dental treatment of cavities, screenings, dental sealants, fluoride application, cleanings, diet counseling, and eye exams for students. Also provides oral health education to parents and students. 1395 Summer Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Uninsured and underinsured youth grades 1-12 Hours: Varies Email (503) 581-7383 1034 -. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 581-7383 ext 1034 Health Services Director Meghan Udlock [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Program hours vary between school year and summer. TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Corner of Summer and Hood Streets Services: Cavity Prevention Measures Eye Examinations Pediatric Dentistry Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - HEALTH AND FITNESS SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - BOYS & GIRLS CLUB SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - SUMMER CAMPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
